violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Observed biscuit pucks in the freezer in the kitchen--Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Observed onions and green peppers on the floor in the walk in cooler

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Observed chest freezers in the back storage room, with duck tape on them. This is not a smooth surface.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food Chicken was sitting in water not thawed in an approved manner. Must be thawed in cooler or under running water at 70 degrees.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface Microwave in kitchen area was not cleaned as frequently as required.
